ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Oklahoma City) */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "postseason" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game is a postseason game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach (foreign key to coaches table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet-inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Years of experience in the NBA */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "average_minutes_played" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play-by-play event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the game (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, OT) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event in the quarter */,
  "home_event" TEXT /* Event description for the home team */,
  "away_event" TEXT /* Event description for the away team */,
  "score_home" TEXT /* Score of the home team at the time of the event */,
  "score_away" TEXT /* Score of the away team at the time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., jump ball, turnover, shot) */,
  "home_score_change" INTEGER /* Change in home team's score from the previous event */,
  "away_score_change" INTEGER /* Change in away team's score from the previous event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES events ("event_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., jump ball, turnover, shot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "event_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the event type (for internal use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play-by-play event the shot belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the shot */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of the shot (e.g., 2-pt shot, 3-pt shot) */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot from the basket */,
  "assisted_by" TEXT /* ID of the player who assisted the shot */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Whether the shot was successful */,
  "shot_value" INTEGER /* Value of the shot (e.g., 2, 3) */,
  "shot_angle" REAL /* Angle of the shot from the basket */,
  "defender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defender closest to the shooter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES play_by_play ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_defender_id FOREIGN KEY ("defender_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play-by-play event the turnover belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who committed the turnover */,
  "turnover_type" TEXT /* Type of the turnover (e.g., lost ball, traveling) */,
  "steal_by" TEXT /* ID of the player who stole the ball */,
  "defender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defender closest to the player committing the turnover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES play_by_play ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_defender_id FOREIGN KEY ("defender_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object listing specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the quarter belongs to */,
  "quarter_number" TEXT /* Number of the quarter (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, OT) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the quarter */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the quarter */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the end of the quarter */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the end of the quarter */,
  "home_score_change" INTEGER /* Change in home team's score from the previous quarter */,
  "away_score_change" INTEGER /* Change in away team's score from the previous quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_quarters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
